name: Medicine Ball Wall Sit-Up
shortDescription: A dynamic core exercise involving a sit-up while throwing and catching a medicine ball against a wall.
instructions: Sit facing a wall with your knees bent, holding a medicine ball at your chest. Perform a sit-up and, at the top, throw the medicine ball against the wall, catch it as it rebounds, then lower back down and repeat.
steps: Sit on the floor facing a wall, knees bent.
Hold a medicine ball at your chest.
Lie back, then perform a sit-up.
At the top, throw the ball against the wall.
Catch the rebound and lower back down.
breathing: Exhale as you sit up/throw, inhale as you lower down.
